steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence has a plural subject ("epic poems") and a linking verb ("are"), so the blank fills a predicate nominative. That predicate nominative must be plural (to agree with the subject) and must serve as the antecedent for the plural relative clause "that tell a story and focus on heroic deeds."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — [possessive form]: possessives don't function as predicate nominatives in this structure. ✗
  • Choice B — 'long poems': plural noun — agrees with the plural subject and correctly anchors the plural verb "tell" in the relative clause. ✓
  • Choice C — [possessive form]: same problem as A — possessives don't fit here. ✗
  • Choice D — [singular noun]: singular — violates number agreement with the plural subject "epic poems." ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
